source: 5K blind test — CadenceClassifier v3.0 — 19 species, 5000 specimens, 11 ocean basins

error_cells.acoustic_profile: infrasonic (pf~17Hz), flat, long duration (>15s), very low urgency, very long IPI
error_cells.root_cause: Blue whale A/B call multi-functional — acoustic signature indistinguishable from navigation pulse by cadence rules alone
error_cells.context_channel: spatiotemporal — feeding grounds vs breeding zones

error_cells.acoustic_profile: complex contour, moderate duration (2–5s), low urgency (0.10–0.25)
error_cells.root_cause: Contact calls with broadcast-like acoustic structure — duration and contour ambiguity. Separator is sequence regularity.
error_cells.context_channel: sequence — ICI variance and response pattern index

error_cells.root_cause: Regular echolocation pulse trains during foraging mistaken for navigation pulses — IPI ranges overlap
error_cells.context_channel: depth — active depth changes (foraging) vs steady transit (navigate)

error_cells.acoustic_profile: complex contour, short duration (1–3s, introductory unit), low urgency
error_cells.root_cause: Broadcast song introductory units — short first unit before repetitive structure establishes. Isolated from sequence context they are acoustically CONTACT.
error_cells.context_channel: sequence — subsequent units reveal song structure

error_cells.acoustic_profile: infrasonic to low-frequency (17–400Hz), flat or complex, long IPI (>5s), very low urgency
error_cells.root_cause: Dominant error. Low-frequency broadcast song units overlap completely with navigation pulse acoustic signature. Season + location is the primary physical separator.
error_cells.context_channel: spatiotemporal — species only broadcast in known geographic zones at known seasons

H4_population.note: H4 is a fallback when H1/H3 unavailable — not a primary error source

key_findings: Zero DIVE errors — descending contour is a universal, uncrossable behavioral constraint across all 19 species
Zero FORAGE/CONTACT confusion — echolocation and social signals are acoustically separable at the cadence level
All 41 errors are at two boundaries: BROADCAST/NAVIGATE (51%) and CONTACT/BROADCAST (39%)
H1 spatiotemporal resolves the dominant error class (20 specimens) with no new acoustic data required
H3 sequence resolves 16 errors but requires full session recording access
1 error (blue whale A/B call) may represent irreducible ambiguity — contested behavioral annotation in literature
